title: సమాసాలు — Samasam (Compounds)
description: Samasam is the process of combining two or more words to form a compound word.

items.heading: ద్వంద్వ సమాసం — Dvandva Compound
items.explanation: Two or more words of equal importance are joined.

items.heading: తత్పురుష సమాసం — Tatpurusha Compound
items.explanation: One word depends on the other; often like 'of', 'for', 'in'.

items.heading: బహువ్రీహి సమాసం — Bahuvrihi Compound
items.explanation: The compound describes a person/thing by a quality.
examples: చంద్రముఖి — One who has a moon-like face.

items.heading: అవ్యయీభావ సమాసం — Avyayibhava Compound
items.explanation: An indeclinable word (avyaya) combines with another word.
